certificates.title: Tourism Innovation
certificates.description: Wonderla Holidays Ltd. Hyderabad has been felicitated with the Award of Excellence in 'Best Innovative Tourism Product' by the Department of Tourism, Telangana in 2023.

certificates.title: Promotional Success
certificates.description: Wonderla Hyderabad has been proudly felicitated as the winner of Innovative Promotional Activity through Media - Print (Tier 1 cities) by IAAPI National Awards for Excellence 2016-17.

certificates.title: Travel Recognition
certificates.description: Wonderla Parks and Resorts has been awarded a Certificate of Appreciation by the India International Travel Mart at Hyderabad in 2021.

certificates.title: Event Runner Up
certificates.description: Wonderla Holidays Limited - Hyderabad has been declared the Runner-Up in the Event at your Facility category at the IAAPI National Awards for Excellence 2023.

certificates.title: HR Excellence
certificates.description: Wonderla Hyderabad has been declared the Runner-Up in Best HR Practices (Tier 1 cities) at the IAAPI National Awards for Excellence 2016-17.

certificates.title: Sustainability & Safety Certified

faqs.question: Can I transfer my ticket to someone else, in case I bought the ticket a few days ago and I am not interested anymore?
faqs.answer: We're sorry, tickets once booked cannot be transferred since the ID proof has to be validated at the entrance. But in the case of an unavoidable circumstance, if you cannot be personally present with your friends/family, then your original photo identity proof as well as the ticket confirmation email/SMS must be presented at the entrance.

faqs.question: Is it possible to refund/cancel/reschedule a ticket purchased under special offers?
faqs.answer: Tickets purchased under special offers cannot be refunded and the ticket is valid only for selected date of visit.

faqs.question: Is the entry ticket inclusive of all the rides inside the park?
faqs.answer: Yes! Once you're in, you can go on any ride as many times as you like.

faqs.question: Do you accept card or UPI payments like GPay, PhonePe, PayTM, etc.?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can pay by card at our ticket counters as well as our restaurants. We also accept payments made through UPI wallets.

footer.tagline: We dream of creating a world of thrilling experience that bring endless joy to adventure of all age groups!
